title: astragalus calamistratus
intro: Astragalus calamistratus, also known as the thread-stem milk-vetch, is a type of plant in the legume family, characterized by its thread-like stems and clusters of small yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus calamistratus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus calamistratus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
